name: Can I get workers comp for stress or mental health issues from my job?
description: Generally difficult. Must prove extraordinary work stress (not normal job pressures) caused a diagnosed mental condition. Physical injuries are much easier.

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp for stress or mental health issues from my job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Generally difficult. Must prove extraordinary work stress (not normal job pressures) caused a diagnosed mental condition. Physical injuries are much easier.
